h1.visual_description: Large, orange, all-caps serif font located at the top of the page above a horizontal divider line.

h2.visual_description: Bold, black serif font, slightly larger than body text, typically followed by a colon to introduce a section.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Emphasis on key terms, specific numerical values, or names of equipment components (e.g., 'coarse adjustment knob').
Critical warnings, essential safety instructions, or mandatory prerequisites for a procedure.
Sequential procedural steps or primary list of observations.
Specific details or secondary effects related to a primary numbered point.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top margin contains a running header with institution name and course ID separated by a thin orange horizontal line. Bottom margin contains a centered page number.
